_comment: FACTORY DEFAULT bindings for this 6-key + 1-knob macropad (VID 1189 / PID 8890), as discovered by observation on 2026-07-17. This is a READ-ONLY restore point -- do NOT edit it. To restore the device to these defaults:  python macropad.py apply default-config.json  (use --dry-run to preview). For day-to-day changes, edit layout.json instead.
device: MINI KeyBoard (VID 0x1189 / PID 0x8890) - 6 keys + 1 knob, 6 LEDs

5.note: Move active window to other monitor (Win+Shift+Right)
